children.source_sentence: The Board discusses matters relating to sustainability risks and relevant performance metrics, which include CLI’s progress on achieving the carbon emissions reduction targets, green building certification, human capital development, stakeholders’ expectations on climate change, social impact and/or other matters.

children.source_sentence: CLI continued to extend its disclosure of Scope 1 emissions on fugitive emissions from chiller top ups.

children.source_sentence: From 2023 to 2024, there was an increase in carbon emissions despite a decrease in energy usage.

children.source_sentence: Climate change and emissions reduction are key and material ESG issues identified as relevant and critical for CLI.

children.source_sentence: The 2023 CRR mentions mitigation measures which are part of CLI’s general strategy to decarbonise and transition to a lower carbon economy.

children.label: [ASSERTED] As one of the more significant risks, carbon price shifts are an area which CLI aims to ad
children.source_sentence: As one of the more significant risks, carbon price shifts are an area which CLI aims to address through decarbonisation initiatives which are part of the CLI 2030 SMP.

children.label: [ASSERTED] CLI supports low-carbon investments and factors climate-related costs and opportunities in
children.source_sentence: CLI supports low-carbon investments and factors climate-related costs and opportunities into its evaluation of new investments or capital expenditure.

children.label: [ASSERTED] It does this through the incorporation of its shadow internal carbon price and application
children.source_sentence: It does this through the incorporation of its shadow internal carbon price and application of its Return on Sustainability metric, which provides CLI the opportunity to build resilience throughout its operations as well as to future-proof its real estate portfolio.

children.label: [ASSERTED] CLI implemented a shadow internal carbon price11 since 2021 to quantify climate-related ri
children.source_sentence: CLI implemented a shadow internal carbon price11 since 2021 to quantify climate-related risks and opportunities for its new investments.

children.source_sentence: This metric aims to redirect investments towards lower-carbon solutions, and renewable energy projects across CLI’s businesses and operations.

children.source_sentence: As such, returns on investments are assessed against environmental impacts such as carbon emission implications.

children.label: [ASSERTED] CLI’s 2030 Scope 1 and 2 carbon emissions reduction targets were validated by the Science
children.source_sentence: CLI’s 2030 Scope 1 and 2 carbon emissions reduction targets were validated by the Science Based Targets initiative (SBTi) to be in line with a 1.5°C trajectory, consistent with the goals of the Paris Agreement12.

children.label: [ASSERTED] It aims to reduce its absolute Scope 1 and 2 emissions by 46% by 2030 from a 2019 base yea
children.source_sentence: It aims to reduce its absolute Scope 1 and 2 emissions by 46% by 2030 from a 2019 base year13, and to reach Net Zero Scope 1 and 2 emissions by 205014.

children.source_sentence: Transit to a low-carbon business, reduce energy consumption through improved energy efficiency and increase use of renewable energy.

children.source_sentence: Achieve green building certification of its global operational portfolio by 2030.

children.source_sentence: In addition, CLI has targets on energy efficiency intensity and renewable energy for its global property portfolio.

children.source_sentence: The assessment also covers performance metrics such as energy efficiency, as well as climate transition and physical risk and opportunity considerations.

children.source_sentence: As part of its AEI and redevelopment projects, it would consider enhanced environmental performance efficiency initiatives including achieving green building certifications, which would help address transition risks such as carbon price shifts, customer expectation changes, and electricity price shifts.

children.source_sentence: CLI has pledged its support for the recommendations by the TCFD since 2019 and has voluntarily published climate-related financial disclosures in its four key areas since 2017.

claims.text: As part of its AEI and redevelopment projects, it would consider enhanced environmental performance efficiency initiatives including achieving green building certifications, which would help address transition risks such as carbon price shifts, customer expectation changes, and electricity price shifts.
claims.source_sentence: As part of its AEI and redevelopment projects, it would consider enhanced environmental performance efficiency initiatives including achieving green building certifications, which would help address transition risks such as carbon price shifts, customer expectation changes, and electricity price shifts.

claims.text: CLI’s 2030 Scope 1 and 2 carbon emissions reduction targets were validated by the Science Based Targets initiative (SBTi) to be in line with a 1.5°C trajectory, consistent with the goals of the Paris Agreement12.
claims.source_sentence: CLI’s 2030 Scope 1 and 2 carbon emissions reduction targets were validated by the Science Based Targets initiative (SBTi) to be in line with a 1.5°C trajectory, consistent with the goals of the Paris Agreement12.

claims.text: It aims to reduce its absolute Scope 1 and 2 emissions by 46% by 2030 from a 2019 base year13, and to reach Net Zero Scope 1 and 2 emissions by 205014.
claims.source_sentence: It aims to reduce its absolute Scope 1 and 2 emissions by 46% by 2030 from a 2019 base year13, and to reach Net Zero Scope 1 and 2 emissions by 205014.

claims.text: It is working towards updating its Scope 3 emissions target, aligned with climate science.
claims.source_sentence: It is working towards updating its Scope 3 emissions target, aligned with climate science.

claims.text: The company likely upholds strong business ethics through robust governance frameworks, board independence, and adherence to global standards, as evidenced by its consistent inclusion in leading sustainability indices and commitment to transparency.

The company likely promotes tenant sustainability through green lease agreements, active tenant engagement programs, and initiatives focused on tenant wellbeing, aligning with its broader sustainability goals and decarbonisation efforts.
